ddls:
CREATE TABLE "election_results" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the state */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Year of the election */,
  "total_ev" INTEGER /* Total number of electoral votes for the state */,
  "d_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of votes for the Democratic nominee */,
  "d_votes" INTEGER /* Number of votes for the Democratic nominee */,
  "r_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of votes for the Republican nominee */,
  "r_votes" INTEGER /* Number of votes for the Republican nominee */,
  "winner" TEXT /* Winner of the election in the state */,
  "margin" REAL /* Margin of victory in the state */,
  "turnout" REAL /* Turnout percentage in the state */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id", "year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the state */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region of the state (e.g., Northeast, South, Midwest) */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the state */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "candidates" (
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each candidate */,
  "candidate_name" TEXT /* Full name of the candidate */,
  "party" TEXT /* Political party of the candidate */,
  "running_mate" TEXT /* Name of the running mate */,
  "platform" TEXT /* Platform of the candidate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("candidate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "election_years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the election */,
  "election_type" TEXT /* Type of election (e.g., presidential, midterm, off-year) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "electoral_votes" (
  "ev_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each electoral vote assignment */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Year of the election */,
  "total_ev" INTEGER /* Total number of electoral votes for the state */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ev_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_electoral_votes_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_electoral_votes_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES election_years ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "voter_demographics" (
  "demographics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic data entry */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Year of the election */,
  "age_bracket" TEXT /* Age bracket of the voters */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the voters */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the voters */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Education level of the voters */,
  "income_bracket" TEXT /* Income bracket of the voters */,
  "urbanization_level" TEXT /* Urbanization level of the voters (e.g., urban, suburban, rural) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demographics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voter_demographics_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES election_years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voter_demographics_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, strategist, public) */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization affiliated with the user */,
  "subscription_plan" TEXT /* Subscription plan of the user (e.g., basic, premium) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Year of the election */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "data_downloaded" INTEGER /* Whether data was downloaded or not */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES election_years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "election_news" (
  "news_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news article */,
  "headline" TEXT /* Headline of the news article */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the news article */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the news article was published */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the news article */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("news_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "candidate_news_mentions" (
  "mention_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mention */,
  "news_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the news article */,
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the candidate */,
  "mention_date" TEXT /* Date when the candidate was mentioned */,
  "mention_type" TEXT /* Type of mention (e.g., positive, negative, neutral) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mention_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_candidate_news_mentions_candidate_id FOREIGN KEY ("candidate_id") REFERENCES candidates ("candidate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_candidate_news_mentions_news_id FOREIGN KEY ("news_id") REFERENCES election_news ("news_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "social_media" (
  "post_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each social media post */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the social media post */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the social media post was published */,
  "platform" TEXT /* Platform where the social media post was published */,
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the candidate mentioned in the post */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_social_media_candidate_id FOREIGN KEY ("candidate_id") REFERENCES candidates ("candidate_id")
)
